---
title: "Final Case Study Project"
author: "Kayathri Angel"
date: "2025-09-20"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Install Packages
#install.packages("sf")
#install.packages(c("cowplot", "googleway", "ggplot2", "ggrepel", 
#"ggspatial", "libwgeom", "sf", "rnaturalearth", "rnaturalearthdata"))

# Load Packages
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(tidyverse)
library("rnaturalearth")
library("rnaturalearthdata")
library(shiny)
library(purrr)
library(mapdeck)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(tidyverse)
```

## Data Preparation

```{r Load Data}
# Load the data from CSV
global_powerplant_df <- read.csv("./Data/global_power_plant_database.csv")
print(head(global_powerplant_df))
```


```{r}
# Filter the original dataset to only include the USA
USA_global_powerplant_temp <- global_powerplant_df %>%
  filter(country == "USA")
head(USA_global_powerplant_temp)
```


```{r}
# Replace any missing values in the generated_gwh columns with estimated values from the 
# estimated_generation_gwh columns, if available, else 0.
years <- 2013:2019
for (yr in years) {
  gen_col <- paste0("generation_gwh_", yr)
  est_col <- paste0("estimated_generation_gwh_", yr)
  if (all(c(gen_col, est_col) %in% names(USA_global_powerplant_temp))) {
    USA_global_powerplant_temp <- USA_global_powerplant_temp %>%
      mutate(!!gen_col := coalesce(.data[[gen_col]], as.numeric(.data[[est_col]]))) %>%
      mutate(!!gen_col := tidyr::replace_na(.data[[gen_col]], 0)) 
  }
}

# Find for missing values in the data
USA_global_powerplant_temp %>%
  select("generation_gwh_2013", "generation_gwh_2014", "generation_gwh_2015",
         "generation_gwh_2016", "generation_gwh_2017", "generation_gwh_2018",
         "generation_gwh_2019") %>%
  summarise_all(~ sum(is.na(.)))

```

```{r}
# Select rows where 'generation_gwh_' have NA values
rows_with_na <- USA_global_powerplant_temp[is.na(USA_global_powerplant_temp$generation_gwh_2018), ]

print(rows_with_na)
```


There are no available estimates for generation_gwh in 2018 and 2019, the NA values still need to be processed as 0.

```{r}
# Drop rows with 0 values
USA_global_powerplant_cleaned <- USA_global_powerplant_temp %>%
  drop_na(generation_gwh_2018, generation_gwh_2019)

# Confirm that all NA value rows are removed
USA_global_powerplant_cleaned %>%
  select("generation_gwh_2013", "generation_gwh_2014", "generation_gwh_2015",
         "generation_gwh_2016", "generation_gwh_2017", "generation_gwh_2018",
         "generation_gwh_2019") %>%
  summarise_all(~ sum(is.na(.)))

```


```{r}
# Only select the important data columsn in the dataset
USA_global_powerplant_df <- subset(USA_global_powerplant_cleaned, 
                                   select = -c(gppd_idnr, other_fuel1, other_fuel2, other_fuel3, source, url, 
                                               geolocation_source, wepp_id, year_of_capacity_data, generation_data_source,
                                               estimated_generation_note_2013, estimated_generation_note_2014,
                                               estimated_generation_note_2015, estimated_generation_note_2016, 
                                               estimated_generation_note_2017,
                                               estimated_generation_gwh_2013, estimated_generation_gwh_2014,
                                               estimated_generation_gwh_2015, estimated_generation_gwh_2016,
                                               estimated_generation_gwh_2017))
USA_global_powerplant_df
```


```{r}
install.packages("rnaturalearthhires", repos = "https://ropensci.r-universe.dev") 
library(rnaturalearthhires) # optional higher-res

usa_states <- ne_states(country = "United States of America", returnclass = "sf")

world <- rnaturalearth::ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")

world_mapping <- world %>%
  select(geometry, sovereignt, name_sort) %>% 
  filter(sovereignt == "United States of America")

powerplant_sf_points <- st_as_sf(USA_global_powerplant_df, coords = c("longitude", "latitude"), crs = 4326)
powerplant_sf_points

# Project the data first, then compute bounds
proj_crs <- st_crs("ESRI:54030")
world_proj <- st_transform(world_mapping, proj_crs)
states    <- st_transform(usa_states, proj_crs)
pp2_proj    <- st_transform(powerplant_sf_points, proj_crs)

# Keep only features overlapping a rough US box in lon/lat before projecting:
us_bbox_ll <- st_bbox(c(xmin = -180, xmax = -65, ymin = -15, ymax = 70), crs = st_crs(4326))
world_us <- st_crop(world_mapping, us_bbox_ll) %>% st_transform(proj_crs)

# Get bounds in projected CRS
b <- st_bbox(world_us)
```


```{r powerplants-map, fig.width=12, fig.height=8, dpi=150}
# Transform to lon/lat (WGS84) for easy xlim/ylim in degrees
world_us_ll <- st_transform(world_us, 4326)
states_ll   <- st_transform(states,   4326)
pp_ll       <- st_transform(pp2_proj, 4326)

# Filter out AK and HI by longitude/latitude bounding box (keeps contiguous US)
lon_min <- -130; lon_max <- -65
lat_min <- 22;   lat_max <- 52

pp_contig <- pp_ll %>%
  filter(st_coordinates(.)[,1] >= lon_min,
         st_coordinates(.)[,1] <= lon_max,
         st_coordinates(.)[,2] >= lat_min,
         st_coordinates(.)[,2] <= lat_max)

# Convert points to simple data.frame coordinates for faster plotting & more control
pp_coords <- pp_contig %>%
  mutate(lon = st_coordinates(.)[,1], lat = st_coordinates(.)[,2]) %>%
  st_set_geometry(NULL)
```


```{r}
gen_cols <- c("generation_gwh_2013","generation_gwh_2014","generation_gwh_2015",
              "generation_gwh_2016","generation_gwh_2017","generation_gwh_2018",
              "generation_gwh_2019")

# convert to a long table: one row per facility-year with its generation value
# keep geometry for spatial operations
pp_long <- pp_contig %>%
  st_as_sf() %>%
  st_transform(4326) %>%
  mutate(id = row_number()) %>%
  select(id, geometry, primary_fuel, name, all_of(gen_cols)) %>%   # include primary_fuel here
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(gen_cols),
               names_to = "year_var",
               values_to = "generation_gwh") %>%
  mutate(year = sub("generation_gwh_", "", year_var))
```



```{r}
# --- PARAMETERS ---
cellsize <- 10000       # Size of each grid cell in meters (10 km x 10 km)
elev_scale <- 50        # (Unused in this snippet, could be used for vertical scaling in 3D maps)
years <- as.character(2013:2019)  # Vector of years to iterate over

# --- PREP: Create a common grid extent so grids align across years ---
# Convert input data to sf (if not already)
pts_all <- if (!inherits(pp_long, "sf")) st_as_sf(pp_long, wkt = "geometry", crs = 4326) else pp_long

# Transform points to metric projection (EPSG:3857) for consistent distance-based grids
pts_all_m <- st_transform(pts_all, 3857)

# Create bounding box around all points
bb <- st_as_sfc(st_bbox(pts_all_m))

# Create a square grid covering the bounding box
grid_all_sfc <- st_make_grid(bb, cellsize = cellsize, square = TRUE)

# Convert grid to sf object with unique cell IDs
grid_all <- st_sf(cell_id = seq_along(grid_all_sfc), geometry = st_sfc(grid_all_sfc))

# --- SET COLOUR PALETTE FOR ALL FUELS ---
all_fuels <- sort(unique(pp_long$primary_fuel)) 
pal_base <- "Set3"                              
n_fuels <- length(all_fuels)                  
maxpal <- RColorBrewer::brewer.pal.info[pal_base, "maxcolors"]  

# Generate color vector for all fuel types
cols_vec <- if (n_fuels <= maxpal) RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(n_fuels, pal_base) else
  colorRampPalette(RColorBrewer::brewer.pal(maxpal, pal_base))(n_fuels)
cols <- setNames(cols_vec, all_fuels)  # Named vector: fuel type -> color

# --- FUNCTION: Aggregate data to grid for a single year ---
make_grid_vis_year <- function(year_chr) {
  
  # Filter data for the given year and trim whitespace in fuel names
  pp_y <- pp_long %>%
    filter(year == year_chr) %>%
    mutate(primary_fuel = trimws(primary_fuel))
  
  # Convert to sf (if not already) and transform to metric coordinates
  pts <- if (!inherits(pp_y, "sf")) st_as_sf(pp_y, wkt = "geometry", crs = 4326) else pp_y
  pts_m <- st_transform(pts, 3857)
  
  # Identify which grid cells intersect with points
  ints <- st_intersects(grid_all, pts_m, sparse = FALSE)
  
  # Subset grid to only cells that contain points (for speed)
  grid_sub <- grid_all[rowSums(ints) > 0, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Spatial join: assign each point to a grid cell
  pts_join <- st_join(pts_m, grid_sub, left = FALSE)
  
  # Aggregate generation by cell and fuel type
  cell_fuel <- pts_join %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%
    group_by(cell_id, primary_fuel) %>%
    summarise(gen = sum(generation_gwh, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Compute total generation per cell
  cell_totals <- cell_fuel %>%
    group_by(cell_id) %>%
    summarise(total_gen = sum(gen, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Identify dominant fuel type per cell (highest generation)
  dominant <- cell_fuel %>%
    group_by(cell_id) %>%
    slice_max(order_by = gen, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
    select(cell_id, primary_fuel)
  
  # Join totals and dominant fuel back to grid geometry
  grid_vis <- grid_sub %>%
    left_join(cell_totals, by = "cell_id") %>%
    left_join(dominant, by = "cell_id") %>%
    mutate(primary_fuel = replace_na(primary_fuel, "None"),
           total_gen = replace_na(total_gen, 0)) %>%
    st_transform(4326)  # Back to geographic coordinates for plotting
  
  # Drop empty cells and assign colors based on dominant fuel
  grid_vis2 <- grid_vis %>%
    filter(!is.na(total_gen) & total_gen > 0) %>%
    mutate(primary_fuel = factor(primary_fuel, levels = sort(unique(grid_vis$primary_fuel))),
           hex = cols[as.character(primary_fuel)]) %>%
    mutate(hex = ifelse(primary_fuel == "None" | is.na(primary_fuel), NA_character_, hex))
  
  # Add HTML tooltip text for interactive map
  grid_vis2$tooltip_info <- paste0(
    "<b>Primary Fuel:</b> ", grid_vis2$primary_fuel, "<br/>",
    "<b>Generated GWh:</b> ", grid_vis2$total_gen)
  
  # Return processed grid for the year
  grid_vis2
}

# --- MAP CENTER (for initializing interactive map) ---
map_center <- c(-100, 25)  # Approximate geographic center of contiguous US

# --- PRECOMPUTE GRIDS FOR ALL YEARS (so slider updates are instantaneous) ---
precomp <- setNames(vector("list", length(years)), years)
for(i in seq_along(years)) {
  yr <- years[i]
  message("Precomputing year ", yr)
  precomp[[yr]] <- make_grid_vis_year(yr)
}

```


```{r}
# Sum the energy produced by fuel type for each year
results_list <- list()

for (yr in years) {
  df_year_df <- filter(pp_long, year %in% as.integer(yr))
  
  # aggregate by fuel type
  agg <- df_year_df %>%
    st_drop_geometry() %>%  
    group_by(primary_fuel) %>%
    summarise(total_GWh = sum(generation_gwh, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") %>%
    mutate(year = as.integer(yr)) %>% 
    ungroup()
  
  results_list[[yr]] <- agg
}

# combine all years
results <- bind_rows(results_list)
print(results)


results_wide <- results %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = primary_fuel,
              values_from = total_GWh,
              values_fill = 0)
print(results_wide)

```



```{r}

# PARAMETERS

source("Secret.R")

set_param

years <- sort(unique(results_wide$year))
map_center <- c(-100, 37)

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("USA Power Plant Energy Production in Gigawatt-Hours (2013–2019)"),
  
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      # 🔹 Single YEAR slider (animates automatically)
      sliderInput(
        "year",
        "Year",
        min = min(years),
        max = max(years),
        value = min(years),
        step = 1,
        sep = "",
        animate = animationOptions(interval = 1000, loop = TRUE)
      ),
      
      selectInput("keep_fuel", "Filter by Fuel Source Type", 
                  choices = c("All", all_fuels), selected = "All"),
      
      checkboxInput("show_legend", "Show Legend", value = TRUE)
    ),
    
    mainPanel(
      mapdeckOutput("map", height = "600px"),
      uiOutput("legend_ui"),
      tags$hr(),
      plotOutput("linePlot", height = "250px")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  
  # --- INITIAL MAP ---
  output$map <- renderMapdeck({
    mapdeck(token = token, style = mapdeck_style("dark"), 
            location = map_center, zoom = 4, pitch = 60)
  })
  
  # --- UPDATE MAP AND LINE CHART TOGETHER ---
  observeEvent(c(input$year, input$keep_fuel, input$show_legend), {
    
    yr <- as.character(input$year)
    grid_vis2 <- precomp[[yr]]
    
    # Fuel filter
    if (input$keep_fuel != "All") {
      grid_vis2 <- grid_vis2 %>% filter(as.character(primary_fuel) == input$keep_fuel)
    }
    
    # Update map
    mapdeck_update(map_id = "map") %>%
      clear_polygon(layer_id = "grid_cells") %>%
      add_polygon(
        data = grid_vis2,
        layer_id = "grid_cells",
        fill_colour = "hex",
        elevation = "total_gen",
        elevation_scale = elev_scale,
        palette = NULL,
        auto_highlight = TRUE,
        tooltip = "tooltip_info",
        update_view = FALSE
      )
    
    # Legend UI
    output$legend_ui <- renderUI({
      if (!input$show_legend) return(NULL)
      fuels_here <- sort(unique(as.character(grid_vis2$primary_fuel)))
      tags$div(style = "display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; margin-top:8px;",
               lapply(fuels_here, function(f) {
                 tags$div(style = "display:flex; align-items:center; margin-right:8px;",
                          tags$div(style = paste0(
                            "width:18px; height:12px; background:", cols[f],
                            "; margin-right:6px; border:1px solid #444;"
                          )),
                          tags$span(f, style = "font-size:12px;")
                 )
               })
      )
    })
    
    # --- LINE CHART (always starts from 2013 up to current year) ---
    output$linePlot <- renderPlot({
      
      fuel_cols <- if (input$keep_fuel == "All") all_fuels else input$keep_fuel
      
      data_long <- results_wide %>%
        select(year, all_of(fuel_cols)) %>%
        pivot_longer(cols = -year, names_to = "fuel", values_to = "GWh") %>%
        filter(year >= min(years), year <= input$year)
      
      ggplot(data_long, aes(x = year, y = GWh, color = fuel)) +
        geom_line(size = 1.5) +
        geom_point(size = 3) +
        scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
        scale_x_continuous(
          breaks = years,
          limits = range(as.numeric(years))
        ) +
        labs(
          title = paste0("Generation Trends by Fuel Type (2013–", input$year, ")"),
          x = "Year",
          y = "Total Generation (GWh)"
        ) +
        theme_minimal() +
        theme(legend.position = "none")
    })
    
  }, ignoreNULL = FALSE)
}

shinyApp(ui, server)

```
